_comment: SAMPLE / READY-TO-USE TEST PO. This is intentionally the multi-line, multi-style order SanMar REQUIRES for the Test environment before go-live (styles taken from the PO Guide v24.3 recommended test set). Before submitting: (1) confirm the shipTo is the real NWCA/decorator address you intend to use in production, (2) confirm each 'color' is the SANMAR_MAINFRAME_COLOR, (3) bump poNumber so it is unique. Validates against po-payload.schema.json.

shipTo._comment: CONFIRM before submit — this should be the address SanMar has on file for NWCA / the decorator.
